# Tooltips

#### Purpose

Interactive design element to navigate a process.

#### Function

Provide a small explanation to help a user understand an action. Always accompanied by an icon

![Example showing tooltip with icon](data:image/png;base64,)

#### General Use

-   For preventing drop-off at friction points by reassuring or alleviating doubt
-   For additional context or necessary information that's too long to put directly on the screen
-   When there are multiple steps, you may use tooltips to take users through the process

#### Details

-   Limit tooltips to 1-2 a screen whenever possible.
-   Do not use tooltips when inline copy can be used.
-   Tooltip copy includes small bits of text of no more than 2-3 sentences per paragraph in sentence case for readability.
-   Use short, complete sentences that tell users what to do and address their concerns (in second point of view, ex., You)
-   Tooltips have contractions for conversational style and are usually placed next to a text field label
-   Limit copy to make them quick and easy to read. Body count 100 characters limit
-   If the tooltip is a list of items, you can either use bullets or put it in paragraph form. If it is a few sentences, user whatever is the best display format for the info.
-   Always include a "CLOSE" label X in the upper right corner that the user can exit when they want
-   Do not use links in tooltips if at all possible to prevent drop off.

## Examples

#### Avoid titles in Tooltips when possible

![Example showing tooltip without title](https://exosphere.boomi.com/assets/tooltip2-abaf792a.png)

#### Do make them quick and easy to read. Preferably, 3 lines or less

![Example showing concise tooltip text](https://exosphere.boomi.com/assets/tooltip3-52e8340b.png)

#### Do use no more than 2-3 lines per paragraph for multiple tooltips

![Example showing tooltip with 2-3 lines per paragraph](https://exosphere.boomi.com/assets/tooltip4-295f7405.png)

#### Do not use multiple tooltips on a page or in a sequence if inline copy can be used

![Example showing when not to use multiple tooltips](https://exosphere.boomi.com/assets/tooltip5-695cb743.png)

#### Do use links in tooltips only if absolutely necessary

![Example showing tooltip with necessary link](https://exosphere.boomi.com/assets/tooltip6-04f845c5.png)

#### Do write in simple, plain language, no punctuation for 3 words or less in most cases

![Example showing simple tooltip language](https://exosphere.boomi.com/assets/tooltip7-9a350f93.png)
